title: Figure 5 in Life history traits of Aporrectodea caliginosa in a 8-year laboratory experiment
author: Frisch, Johannes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5. Cocoon production (number of cocoons 28 days-1) by the individual kept alone since its isolation from other individuals. The red arrows denote the trend of quantity of cocoon produced.
steps_raw: Figure 5. Cocoon production (number of cocoons 28 days-1) by the individual kept alone since its isolation from other individuals. The red arrows denote the trend of quantity of cocoon produced.
